claims.summary: First-valid entropy and rolling entropy mean answer different temporal questions.
claims.disposition: Verified separate first-connection and bounded-window fields, plus variance, range, and earliest-to-latest direction.

claims.summary: The rolling mean can hide sharp entropy peaks relevant to Astrid's reported packed weight.
claims.disposition: Added peak_spectral_entropy_in_window as the maximum finite value in the existing bounded entropy window, with additive serde defaults and focused tests.

claims.summary: Telemetry jitter and entropy spikes may covary in a way that contributes to felt viscosity.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded cadence, entropy-peak, integration-wait, and felt-review comparison. Separate metrics do not themselves establish a transport-to-felt causal link.

claims.summary: Technical cadence and spectral entropy should remain distinguishable even when they are experienced as one friction.
claims.disposition: Verified separate typed fields and explicit non-cadence, non-felt, non-causal evidence bases.
